implBasis: Self-built grid/flex layout (no Radix primitive); consumes Sidebar / ChromeHeader / Sheet / ScrollArea / useIsNarrowViewport
notes: Verified layout modes (primary-sidebar vs primary-header row structure), header banner mechanics (chrome-header renders <header> in 3 branches, div-wrapped body-scoped → implicit banner), ⌘. aside toggle (e.key==='.' + meta/ctrl, preventDefault), ⌘B delegated to Sidebar (not registered in AppShell), aside width clamp 240-640/default 320/xl=1280 breakpoint-keyed, resolveAsideWidth logic, mobile breakpoint 768 (isNarrow = innerWidth<768), inline vs modal(Sheet side=right) aside, ScrollArea+min-h-0 scroll ownership, main padding=0/overflow-y-auto/tabIndex=-1/id=app-shell-main, SkipToMain #app-shell-main focus:z-50 (only z in root), no z-index on root, useAppShell returns {layout,asideOpen,setAsideOpen,isMobile}, all props exist, SizeMatrix clamp examples, principles/anatomy LinkTo story names all exist (主側欄佈局—Linear/主側欄佈局+頁面分頁/主標頭佈局—全域+本地兩層), demo-helper exports (AcmeSidebar/PageHeader/GlobalHeader/AccountMenu) all exist.

falseClaims.宣稱: '在議題列表、看板、報表等頁面間切換時,左側導覽不重渲染、捲動位置不丟失' — 絕對式宣稱跨頁切換 sidebar 不重渲染、scroll position 保留
falseClaims.真實code行為: AppShell 只把 `sidebar` 當 ReactNode slot render;是否重渲染 / scroll 是否保留完全取決於 consumer 是否跨 route 保持同一個 Sidebar element 實例掛載。若 consumer 每頁重建 sidebar 或重掛 AppShell,sidebar 就會重渲染 + 丟 scroll。AppShell 本身不保證此行為 → 絕對式宣稱應是條件式(depends on consumer DOM instance)

falseClaims.宣稱: A11y: '`<header>`(ChromeHeader)在兩種模式下都只被 `<div>` 包覆(body-scoped、與 `<main>` 並排而非子層)'
falseClaims.真實code行為: 在 primary-header mode 有兩個 header:globalHeader 是 root flex-col 第一個 child(在 row2 之上,**非** main column 的 sibling,與 `<main>` 不並排);只有 local header 才在 main column 內與 `<main>` 並排。spec.md A11y 表(L274-275)有正確分兩列處理,唯 anatomy 這句以『兩種模式下都...與 main 並排』過度一般化(banner outcome 對兩者仍成立,但『與 main 並排』對 global header 不成立)
